title: Totem Overlays
description: Shows a red customizable overlay on your screen when you aren't holding a totem in your main/offhand.
body:
## What is this mod?
This mod adds a red overlay that appears when you aren't holding a totem of undying. The overlay is customizable to any color of your choice, making it easy to match your style. This mod is especially suitable for crystal pvpers who want a visual reminder to keep their totem of undying on hand.

The settings screen is accessible by using the command `/totemoverlays`

## Do I need any other mods to use this one?

Yes, you do. You need the [Tulip Config Manager API](https://modrinth.com/mod/tulip) to run this mod, as it provides the necessary tools for the mod to give you the ability to change the color of the overlay. Install both mods and you'll be up and running in no time.

## What Minecraft versions does this mod support?

Currently, this mod supports all versions of 1.19, but 1.20 support is going to come whenever crystal pvp becomes popular on those versions.
